name: 田中健一的信纸
shooting_angle: off-screen, folded if visible, no unfolding
readable_text_policy: unreadable block only, no text content displayed
reference_prompt: A single sheet of light beige A5 writing paper, approximately 14.8cm x 21cm, ordinary paper material, folded once, with dark blue handwritten ink visible only as indistinct scribbles, kept off-screen or in possession without revealing any readable text, static and unchanged throughout.。源记录硬约束：数量:1张；位置:首帧画面外，仅由樱子台词提及；运动政策:全程保持画面外，不展开纸面，不展示新增文字内容

source_contract.position: 首帧画面外，仅由樱子台词提及
source_contract.motion_policy: 全程保持画面外，不展开纸面，不展示新增文字内容
source_contract.quantity_policy: 全镜头仅1张信纸，作为台词提及物保持同一设定
